title: Explore Our Services
subtitle: Click a service to learn more.

items.title: Cost Analyzer
items.slogan: See exactly where every dollar is being spent across clouds.

items.title: Category Views
items.slogan: Slice spend by teams, projects, and business categories.

items.title: K8s Cost Observability
items.slogan: Track Kubernetes spend by namespace, pod, and workload.

items.title: Recommendations
items.slogan: Get actionable suggestions to reduce waste and optimize resources.

items.title: Anomaly Detection
items.slogan: Spot unusual spend patterns before they become budget surprises.

items.title: Reporting
items.slogan: Build and schedule cost reports for stakeholders.

items.title: Virtual Tags
items.slogan: Tag resources dynamically without changing cloud metadata.

items.title: Cost Allocation
items.slogan: Allocate spend to teams, products, and business units.

items.title: Unit Economics
items.slogan: Understand cost per user, request, and feature usage.

items.title: Forecasting
items.slogan: Predict next quarter's spend with historical trends.

items.title: Budgeting
items.slogan: Set spend targets and get alerts when you’re close to limits.
